subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen proclaimeth: Creation hath been brought into being for the recognition of Truth, and today the Manifestation of power and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی میفرماید خلق از برای عرفان حق بوجود آمده اند و الیوم مظهر قدرت و
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @methods of teaching the Cause, @knowledge; recognition of God
